calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Continued To Jul-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. appearing represented by Soheila Omrani, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Don Rene Alvarado General Contractor Inc. not appearing.

The court is aware of the 170.6 challenge to Judge Tong on this matter. The court does not have a bench officer available to hear this matter this date.

This matter is continued to July 24, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 when there will be a Visiting Judge in this department.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
